name: fantastic-ts
description: Fantastic frontend kernel — view logic as typed agents, federated to the host over the bridge. Zero runtime deps; vendored (no CDN). The python `web` bundle serves dist/.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && mkdir -p dist/vendor && cp src/vendor/three.module.js src/vendor/xterm.js src/vendor/xterm.css src/vendor/addon-fit.js dist/vendor/
